candidate_definitions.text: Secure environments for developers and their agents

NOTE: Most of the contents of this repository have been migrated to the new devcontainers GitHub org (https://github.com/devcontainers). See https://github.com/devcontainers/template-starter and https://github.com/devcontainers/feature-starter for information on creating your own!

**IMPORTANT NOTE: Dev containers have a new, expanded home in the [dev containers GitHub org](https://github.com/devcontainers)! We're so excited to connect with you there. To learn more, you can check out our [migration announcement](https://github.com/microsoft/vscode-dev-cont…
